title: Weak Agent Off Happy Recovery
goal: Resolve #404 by proving and improving weak-agent recovery when agents partially comply, start from the wrong surface, or misuse package commands.
non_goals: Do not build a new autopilot subsystem.
Do not prevent every possible misuse.
Do not add a broad training guide.

intent.outcome: At least three synthetic off-happy-path scenarios have explicit expected recovery signals, and one weak recovery path is improved if current behavior is insufficient.
intent.constraints: Keep compliant `agentic-workspace start --format json` compact; prefer existing router/error/proof output over new concepts.
intent.latitude: Choose the smallest set of startup, report, proof, generated-adapter, and invalid-command scenarios that exercise weak-agent misuse recovery.
intent.escalation: Escalate if the fix requires changing public workflow semantics or broad command generation architecture.

execution.next_step: Archive this plan, update external issue evidence, close #404, then promote the next child slice.
execution.proof: Focused recovery tests, package proof selector, full workspace CLI tests, ruff, planning doctor, summary, and reconcile passed.

invariants: Default startup remains compact for compliant agents.
Recovery signals route back to compact package entrypoints before deep prose or review artifacts.
Generated adapter direct-edit recovery routes to authoritative source contracts and proof checks.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Improve weak-agent recovery and strong-agent leverage so the package carries work continuity without relying on perfect obedience.

required_continuation.activation trigger: After #404 is validated, promote the next open child slice in the weak-agent recovery lane.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Weak-agent recovery from package misuse is represented in compact router/proof output and protected by tests.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: Lifecycle mutation safety and validation-vs-intent closeout remain separate child slices in this lane.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: Direct root CLI recovery-routing edits still rely on the current non-generated implementation, so proof output must keep that review visible.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: Promote the next weak-agent recovery child slice from state.toml.

intent_interpretation.literal request: Ingest and implement all issues lane by lane. Commit and push after each milestone. Collect dogfooding evidence.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Dogfood package planning surfaces while closing the next explicit weak-agent recovery issue with proof.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Implement #404 as a bounded test/output hardening slice.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Confirm there are three or more recovery scenarios, one improved signal, compact default startup unchanged, and the parent lane still carries remaining work.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: workspace CLI implementation/tests plus planning evidence surfaces for #404
execution_bounds.required validation commands: focused tests, full workspace CLI tests, ruff, planning doctor, summary, reconcile
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Any broad CLI decomposition or generated-command architecture change.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Unrelated package internals, non-workspace generated outputs, or broad lifecycle mutation logic.

context_budget.live working set: issue #404, summary output, state.toml, tests/test_workspace_cli.py, src/agentic_workspace/cli.py
context_budget.recoverable later: GitHub issue body and archived plan closeout
context_budget.externalize before shift: Keep this plan updated with scenario, proof, and closeout state.
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Active slice #404: test and improve weak-agent recovery from package misuse.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Unexpected broad CLI changes, proof failure, or discovery that #404 is already fully satisfied.

references.label: Test weak-agent off-happy-path recovery from package misuse

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Make weak-agent package misuse recovery first-class for #404.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Keep compliant startup compact; do not introduce a new autopilot subsystem or broad training guide.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact test placement and wording of recovery signals, as long as at least three scenarios and one improved path are covered.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: A recovery improvement requires changing public workflow semantics, generation architecture, or cross-package lifecycle behavior.

active_milestone.scope: Synthetic misuse/recovery scenarios and compact recovery signal hardening.

immediate_next_action: Add focused tests for off-happy-path recovery signals and improve the weakest current output.
invariants: Default startup remains compact for compliant agents.
Recovery signals route back to compact package entrypoints before deep prose or review artifacts.
Generated adapter direct-edit recovery routes to authoritative source contracts and proof checks.
validation_commands: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q -k "recovery or invalid_command or proof_changed or report_default_profile or start_command"
uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed tests/test_workspace_cli.py src/agentic_workspace/cli.py --format json
uv run ruff check src tests
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: At least three off-happy-path scenarios are tested or documented with expected recovery signals.
At least one weak recovery output is improved.
Default compact startup remains unchanged for compliant agents.
Planning evidence records dogfooding and carries remaining lane work forward.

execution_run.what happened: Added compact off-happy-path recovery scenarios to report routing, improved invalid command startup recovery guidance, added proof recovery signals for generated/direct CLI edits, and protected the behavior with tests.
execution_run.scope touched: workspace CLI implementation/tests and planning evidence surfaces
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q -k "report_default_profile or invalid_command or proof_changed_selector_routes_generated_command_packages or proof_changed_selector_flags_direct_cli_edits or proof_changed_selector_flags_additive_only_durable_surface"; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed tests/test_workspace_cli.py src/agentic_workspace/cli.py --format json; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run agentic-workspace reconcile --format json
